title: Add setting option for "hover" or "click-to-open" sidebar (left pane)
excerpt:

posts.author: hbeckett (Haley Beckett)
posts.cookedHtml:
With the recent UI update, we’ve lost the ability to reveal the sidebar by hovering and are now only able to have the sidebar open or collapsed. (Photos below.)

I would like to suggest a user setting that allows each user the choice between sidebar reveal options. For those of use with limited screen space and need the convenience of switching boards quickly: being able to hover to reveal the sidebar, rather than having it always open, is the easiest and fastest option. Losing this feature is a big downgrade in my opinion. However, I understand it wasn’t for everyone, which is why I think a setting option would be ideal.

Screenshot 2025-03-25 at 9.53.03 AM680×1062 65.5 KB

Screenshot 2025-03-25 at 11.42.56 AM858×602 73.1 KB

posts.author: RandyReed (Randy Reed)
posts.cookedHtml: Yeah, since the most recent update, this has been nagging at me. I hate (I know, “hate” is a strong word) the loss of the ability to hover over the navigation bar. The “<” symbol (hide) auto-hides when you hover off of the side navigation bar and seems to take longer to pop up some times. Is there no way to restore this feature? Please?
